title: Tiruchirappalli、Tamil Nadu — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Tiruchirappalli、Tamil Nadu的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Tiruchirappalli是Tamil Nadu的一个城市，人口约1,000,000。A historic city in Tamil Nadu, known for the Rockfort Temple, Srirangam temple complex, and its central location in the state.
